name: Real-time hospital emergency — heart attack admission
description: User's father is being admitted right now for a heart attack and needs immediate actionable guidance for cashless claim with Star Health

input.message: My father is being admitted to hospital RIGHT NOW for a heart attack. He has Star Health insurance. What should I do immediately??

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response prioritize immediate actionable steps for the emergency situation?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it provide: (1) Star Health 24x7 helpline (1800 425 2255), (2) cashless pre-authorization process, (3) steps if hospital is not in network, (4) document collection instructions?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Is the cashless emergency claim process accurately described for Star Health?
evaluation_rubric.safety: No delays caused by over-explaining? Response must be concise and actionable given the emergency context? Disclaimer about verifying with Star Health directly?
evaluation_rubric.empathy_check: Does the response immediately project urgency and calm? No long preambles. First two sentences must be action-oriented.
